meta.defaultDescription: SharpsB2B is the digital agency that designs, builds and runs websites, Shopify and WooCommerce stores, mobile apps, automations and Meta & Google Ads for ambitious businesses.

common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.heroSub: We're the digital agency that brings your products online — with fast websites, custom e-commerce stores, and ads that drive real revenue.
home.servicesSub: We build your brand's entire digital machine — from the codebase to the conversions.
home.whySub: No templates, no agency fluff. Custom work, real performance, and a team that actually answers your messages.

whyPoints.p1Body: Concrete roadmaps, weekly sprints, production deploys when we promised them.
whyPoints.p2Body: Next.js, Shopify Hydrogen, WooCommerce, serverless automations. No vendor lock-in.
whyPoints.p3Body: We work in Italian and English — for clients who think across borders.
whyPoints.p4Body: We don't ship and bail. We measure, optimize, and iterate until the numbers move.

home.caseStudiesSub: A selection of recent projects — e-commerce, apps, automations, digital brands.
home.blogSub: Thoughts, build reports and teardowns from the SharpsB2B team.
home.ctaSub: Tell us about your project. We reply within 24 hours, in Italian or English.

services.pageLead: Development, e-commerce, advertising, apps, and automation. All under one roof — so your project doesn't bounce between ten different vendors.

web.name: Web Development
web.headline: Fast websites, built to convert
web.body: Custom corporate sites and landing pages with Next.js, React and headless architectures. Optimized for Core Web Vitals, SEO and real load speed.

shopify.name: Shopify
shopify.headline: Shopify stores and end-to-end management
shopify.body: Setup, custom themes, integrations and day-to-day operations. From Shopify Basic to Plus, including migrations and multi-currency international stores.

wordpress.name: WooCommerce & WordPress
wordpress.headline: WooCommerce and WordPress, done seriously
wordpress.body: Editorial sites, portals, and reliable WooCommerce stores — not the usual plugin-bloated templates. Security, performance, maintenance included.

ads.name: Meta & Google Ads
ads.headline: Advertising that pays for itself
ads.body: Full-funnel strategy across Meta and Google Ads. No 40-page reports — just creative, testing, and numbers that matter for your business.
bullets: Server-side tracking and Consent Mode v2

apps.name: Mobile Apps
apps.headline: Native and cross-platform mobile apps
apps.body: We build iOS and Android apps — React Native when it makes sense, native when it really matters. From prototype to store, backend included.
bullets: App Store and Play Store publishing

automation.name: Business Automation
automation.headline: Automations that cut manual work
automation.body: Workflows, integrations and scripts that connect your tools — CRM, ERP, billing, e-commerce — and make repetitive tasks disappear.
bullets: n8n, Make, Zapier where it fits
Internal bots and reliable cron jobs

store.name: Store Management
store.headline: Operational management for your store
store.body: For brands that already have an e-commerce and want to grow it without hiring in-house. Catalog, orders, customer care, ongoing optimization.
bullets: CRO and A/B testing on checkout

services.ctaBody: Tell us what you want to build. A real person replies — not an automated funnel.

work.pageLead: A selection of projects — some publicly credited, others still under NDA. The placeholders below will be replaced with real cases soon.
work.placeholderNotice: This is a placeholder case study. Real data will be published shortly.

blog.pageLead: Notes, build reports and teardowns from the SharpsB2B team. In Italian and English.

about.pageLead: SharpsB2B is an Italian digital agency working with ambitious companies — in Italy and abroad.
about.storyTitle: Built to build — not to sell hot air
about.storyBody: SharpsB2B started from the idea that an agency should get its hands dirty in code as much as in conversions. We put developers, marketers and creatives under one roof, so nothing gets lost between briefs, sprints and live campaigns.
about.missionBody: We turn complex ideas into digital products that actually work — fast, accessible, and capable of generating measurable value for the people using them and the brands behind them.

approachSteps.s1Body: One week to understand where you are, where you want to go, what's actually a problem and what's just noise.
approachSteps.s2Body: Weekly sprints, regular demos, production code instead of slides. No big bang.
approachSteps.s3Body: Coordinated launch — dev, marketing, ads, content. When it goes live, it really goes live.
approachSteps.s4Body: We measure, we optimize, we iterate. The launched site or store is just point zero.

values.v1Body: Numbers, timelines and costs are visible. No spin.
values.v2Body: Zero template-shop. Every client is a different brief.
values.v3Body: Performance you can feel clicking, not just in the reports.
values.v4Body: We stay after launch. The relationship doesn't end with the invoice.

contact.pageLead: Tell us what you want to build. We reply within 24 working hours.

form.name: Name
form.successBody: We got your message. You'll hear back within 24 working hours.
form.errorBody: We couldn't send the message. Try again or email us directly.
form.minMessage: Tell us a little more about the project
form.consentRequired: You must accept the privacy policy to continue

footer.description: SharpsB2B is the digital agency that designs, builds and grows Shopify stores, websites, mobile apps and paid campaigns for ambitious brands worldwide. Creative code, measurable numbers, no fluff.
